chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr.Misc.A.No.233 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of main case 24.10.2024 Mr. Zahoor Ahmed Shah, Addl.P.G. = None present for the applicant. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE Hafiz
